basic_details.job_title: HFWD Assam Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Health & Family Welfare Department Assam (HFWD Assam)
basic_details.short_information: Health & Family Welfare Department Assam (HFWD Assam) has officially released the Director of Health Service, Assam Recruitment 2026 notification (Advt. No. HLA/E-175823/149) for 1 vacancy in Assam. Eligible candidates aged between 59 to 63 years with an MBBS Degree, Assam Medical Council Registration, and required experience in State Health Service can apply online from the notification release date to 31 July 2026 via the official HFWD Assam portal. Selected candidates will be appointed on a contractual basis with a monthly salary of ₹30,000 – ₹1,10,000/- (Pay Band-4) + Grade Pay ₹17,500/- a

age_limit.age_details: Minimum 59 years and maximum 63 years as on 1st January of 2026.
age_limit.details: Minimum age: 59 years Maximum age: 63 years Age as on 1st January 2026. Age relaxation is not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree with Assam Medical Council Registration. Post Graduate Qualifications preferred. Minimum 20 years of service in State Health Service. Minimum 5 years of administrative experience in the rank of SDM&HO and above.
qualification.details: MBBS Degree and having Registration under Assam Medical Council. Candidate with Post Graduate Qualifications will be given preference with degree holders getting priority over diploma holders. Minimum of 20 (twenty) years of service in the State Health Service. 5 (five) years of administrative experience in the rank of SDM&HO and above.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 30,000/- - 1,10,000/- Pay Band-4 + Grade Pay Rs. 17,500/- + other allowances as admissible
salary_details.details: Pay Band: 4 Grade Pay: Rs. 17,500/- Basic Pay Range: Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 1,10,000/- Allowances: Other allowances as admissible Rules: The Assam Service (Revision of Pay) Rules, 2017

selection_process: Candidates have to appear in front of a Selection Committee chaired by Chief Secretary
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HFWD Assam Director of Health Service, Assam Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HFWD Assam to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the HFWD Assam Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download HFWD Assam Director of Health Service, Assam Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HFWD Assam Director of Health Service, Assam Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HFWD Assam to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: HFWD Assam Director of Health Service, Assam Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Director of Health Service, Assam post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Director of Health Service, Assam post is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 59 years and the maximum age limit is 63 years as of January 1st, 2026. Candidates must fall within this age bracket to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Director of Health Service, Assam position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree with registration under the Assam Medical Council. Post-graduate qualifications are preferred, and preference will be given to degree holders over diploma holders.

faq.question: Q4. How many years of service experience are required?
faq.answer: A minimum of 20 years of service in the State Health Service is mandatory. Additionally, candidates must have at least 5 years of administrative experience in the rank of SDM&HO and above.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Director of Health Service, Assam post?
faq.answer: The salary is as per The Assam Service (Revision of Pay) Rules, 2017, with a Pay Band of Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 1,10,000/- (Pay Band-4) plus a Grade Pay of Rs. 17,500/-, along with other admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the Director of Health Service, Assam post?
faq.answer: Candidates will be selected based on their appearance before a Selection Committee chaired by the Chief Secretary of Assam.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official HFWD Assam website to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Director of Health Service, Assam position is on a contract basis.
